title: Subscription Management
managePlan: Manage your subscription plan and billing
starterPlanDetails: Perfect for established wedding planners with a growing business.
proPlanDetails: For professional wedding planners with multiple clients and advanced needs.

securePayment.title: Secure Payment
securePayment.description: Your payment information is processed securely. We do not store your credit card details.
